ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Approximate population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Approximate area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province/state */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province/state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the province/state belongs to */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the province/state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Approximate population of the province/state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provinces_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province/state the region belongs to */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Approximate urbanization rate of the region (in percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, healthcare provider) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Incidence rate of COVID-19 */,
  "case_fatality_ratio" REAL /* Case-fatality ratio of COVID-19 */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Hospitalization rate of COVID-19 */,
  "icu_occupation_rate" REAL /* ICU occupation rate of COVID-19 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 data the link belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the link belongs to */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was retrieved from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 data the prediction belongs to */,
  "predicted_cases" INTEGER /* Predicted number of cases */,
  "predicted_deaths" INTEGER /* Predicted number of deaths */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the prediction (in percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES model_metadata ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model being evaluated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the performance metric was recorded */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the given date */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model on the given date */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model on the given date */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES model_metadata ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metadata" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used to train the model (in JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 data the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Visualization data in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization involved in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., contributor, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES users ("organization"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
